description.value: Price 5,000 gp; Slot none; CL 10th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate illusion DESCRIPTION This +1 heavy wrist launcher appears to be a lavish, gold bracelet. This functions like the glamered weapon special ability, except a biting bracelet is able to only assume this one specific form, and can revert to its innocuous appearance 1 round after being used as a weapon. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,775 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells disguise (?), magic aura
